name: Iso11783PDDSetValue
title: Iso11783PDDSetValue
syntax: long Iso11783PDDSetValue( dword ecuHandle, dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber, float alue );
description: Sets the value of a process variable.

example.code:
Iso11783PDDSetValue( Sprayer, 0x200. 3, value );
Iso11783PDDSetValue( Sprayer, 0x200. 4, value );
